Addresses of Related People
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns addresses associated with individuals related to the queried company, regardless of whether the address is directly linked to the company's tax ID (CNPJ). The return includes a list of identified addresses, attributes describing each address, and the type of relationship of the associated individual.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: related_people_addresses.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
relationshiptype	Type of relationship	Equal	QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative
type	Type of address	Contains	work, home
isratified	Indicates whether the address is verified.	Equal	true, false
isactive	Indicates whether the address is active.	Equal	true, false
isrecent	Indicates whether the address is recent.	Equal	true, false
ismain	Indicates whether the address is a primary address.	Equal	true, false
state	State acronym	Equal	RJ, SP, MG, ES...
zipcode	Address zip code	Starts with	Any complete postal code or the first x digits.
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x).

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result
array of objects
required

Result lists

object
RelatedPeopleAddresses
array of objects
required
object
RelationshipType
string
required

Indicates the type of relationship associated with this record. (QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative)

Typology
string
required

Type of street (Street, Avenue, etc...).

Title
string
required

Ownership of the address (ie Praça, Nossa Senhora, Barão).

AddressMain
string
required

Address core.

Number
string
required

Address port number.

Complement
string
required

Address complement (ie Block, Apartment, etc...).

Neighborhood
string
required

Address neighborhood.

ZipCode
string
required

Postal code of the address.

City
string
required

Address city.

State
string
required

Abbreviation of the state of the address (ie SP, RJ, etc...).

Country
string
required

Address country.

Type
string
required

Composite field that describes the related entity and the address context. (RELATED - {DOCUMENT-NUMBER} - {RELATIONSHIP-TYPE} - {ADDRESS-TYPE (HOME, WORK or OFFICIAL REGISTRATION)}).

ComplementType
string
required

Address type calculated from the complement of the address (APARTMENT, HOUSE, STORE, COMMERCIAL OFFICE).

HouseholdCode
string
required

Code that uniquely identifies each individual address - each apartment or room within a building, each house within a villa, etc...

BuildingCode
string
required

Alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies a building or construction, that is, it works with the address up to the level of its door number.

HouseholdTotalPassages
integer
required

Number of times this Household code has been seen for this entity.

HouseholdBadPassages
integer
required

Number of times this household code was seen for this entity in a suspicious situation.

HouseholdCrawlingPassages
integer
required

Number of Household code passes with the entity originating a capture.

HouseholdValidationPassages
integer
required

Number of passes of the Household code with the entity originating a validation.

HouseholdQueryPassages
integer
required

Number of Household code passes with the entity originating a query.

HouseholdMonthAveragePassages
integer
required

Average number of times the Household code was seen with the entity per month.

HouseholdNumberOfEntities
integer
required

Number of distinct entities associated with this Household code.

BuildingTotalPassages
integer
required

Number of times this Building code was seen for this entity.

BuildingBadPassages
integer
required

Number of times this Building code was seen for this entity in a suspicious situation.

BuildingCrawlingPassages
integer
required

Number of passes of the building code (Building code) with the entity that originates a capture.

BuildingValidationPassages
integer
required

Number of building code passes (Building code) with the entity that originates from a validation.

BuildingQueryPassages
integer
required

Number of passages of the building code (Building code) with the entity that originates a query.

BuildingMonthAveragePassages
integer
required

Average number of times the Building code was viewed with the entity per month.

BuildingNumberOfEntities
integer
required

Number of distinct entities associated with this building code (Building code).

BuildingNumberOfHouseholds
integer
required

Number of distinct Households associated with this building (Building code).

Last3MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages in the last 3 months.

Last6MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages in the last 6 months.

Last12MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages in the last 12 months.

Last18MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages in the last 18 months.

Priority
integer
required

Indicates the address priority (if there is more than one).

IsMain
boolean
required

Indicates whether the address is the primary.

IsRecent
boolean
required

Indicates whether this address is recent.

IsActive
boolean
required

Indicates whether this address is active.

IsRatified
boolean
required

Indicates whether the address has been ratified by the postal reference base (DNE or similar).

FirstPassageDate
string
required

Date of this household's first pass with this entity.

LastPassageDate
string
required

Date of last pass of this household with this entity.

CreationDate
string
required

Record creation date

LastUpdateDate
string
required

Date of last record update.

HasOptIn
boolean
required

Flag that indicates whether there has been explicit acceptance of orders and advertisements by this address in our database

AdditionalOutputData
object
required

List of additional data referring to the address, such as IBGE Code.

HAS ADDITIONAL FIELDS
Latitude
number
required

Address latitude.

Longitude
number
required

Address length.

QueryId
string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string
required

The date when the request was received and processed.

Status
object
required

Status list for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES
Evidences
object
required

List of evidence used for each dataset.

Adresses
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset compiles addresses associated with the consulted company, including aggregated information and attributes that describe address characteristics such as recency, priority, activity status, and type of affiliation. The result considers the consolidation of similar addresses through building code identifiers, allowing for more consistent analyses and reducing duplication in data modeling and enrichment scenarios.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: addresses_extended.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
zipcode	Used in conjunction with the address number to assist in constructing the building code, increasing the quality of the result.	CEP
addressnumber	Used in conjunction with the postal code to assist in constructing the building code identifier, increasing the quality of the result.	Address number
useRawRFData	It instructs the system to return the address exactly as captured from the Federal Revenue Service, without standardization or automatic corrections.	true, false

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
Type	Type of address	Equal	work, home
isratified	Indicates whether the address is verified.	Equal	true, false
isactive	Indicates whether the address is active.	Equal	true, false
isrecent	Indicates whether the address is recent.	Equal	true, false
ismain	Indicates whether the address is a primary address.	Equal	true, false
state	Abbreviation of the federative unit	Equal	RJ, SP, MG, ES, ...
zipcode	Address zip code	Starts with	Full postal code or first digits
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x).

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object

required

object

The main object returned by the dataset, containing consolidated information related to the queried entity.

EXTENDEDADDRESSES OBJECT

string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string

The date when the request was received and processed.

Political Involvement
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset aggregates information related to the political involvement of the company's shareholders, including participation in election campaigns, history of candidacies, and holding public office, in addition to a normalized consolidated score that allows for the relative classification of individuals associated with the company.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: political_involvement.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042

Companies

Company Evolution
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset presents the temporal evolution of a company's registration and structural information, including variations in share capital, number of employees, and number of partners over time, allowing for historical analysis and use in analytical and risk models. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please consult the Economic documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: company_evolution.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 and above	BRL 19,000.00 (fixed price)

Media Profile and Exposure
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers information about the public exposure of entities in open media sources, including associated journalistic content, aggregated indicators of visibility and the nature of the exposure, as well as sentiment analysis of the identified mentions. The returned news items are associated with the consulted entity through contextual inference based on the name identified in the content and, when provided, on the keywords submitted in the query. Less precise associations may occur in cases of very common or generic names, considering that the publications do not use formal identifiers such as CNPJ (Brazilian tax ID).

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: media_profile_and_exposure.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.090
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.085
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.081
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.077
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.073
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 61,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
keywords	Allows you to restrict the returned content based on specific keywords, separated by commas.	Any text.
Ex.: keywords[lavagem de dinheiro, vice-prefeito, corrupção]
keywords_operator	Define the logic for combining the given keywords.	OR, AND

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
title	News title	Contains	Any text
sourcename	Name of the source responsible for the news	Contains	Any text
categories	News category	Contains	Any text
label	Sentiment rating assigned to the news story.	Equal	NEGATIVE, POSITIVE, NEUTRAL, UNDEFINED, POLARIZED, SLIGHTLY_POSITIVE, SLIGHTLY_NEGATIVE
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x).

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

Exposure indicators

The indicators returned summarize different dimensions of the entity's media presence:

MediaExposureLevel: indicates the level of exposure based on the total volume of news associated with the entity in a given period.
CelebrityLevel: reflects how frequently the entity appears in news content over time.
UnpopularityLevel: estimates the degree of unpopularity of the entity considering the proportion of negative mentions and the relevance of the associated sources.
Search by name

When the search is performed exclusively by name (key) name{XXXX} or name{XXXX}, tradename{XX}(without sending other keys or including other datasets, the search is performed without using a document (CNPJ). In these cases, the search independently considers:)

the full name provided (name)
the trade name (tradename(when informed)

If other keys are sent in the query or other datasets are included in the request, full dataset processing will be applied.

Interpreting the field SentimentAnalysis

The field SentimentAnalysis It indicates the predominant sentiment identified in each news item associated with the consulted entity, based on text analysis models applied to journalistic content.

Label	Description
NEGATIVE	Predominance of negative sentiment
POSITIVE	Predominance of positive sentiment
NEUTRAL	Absence of a clear predominance of feeling.
UNDEFINED	It was not possible to infer sentiment.
POLARIZED	Simultaneous presence of positive and negative feelings.
SLIGHTLY_POSITIVE	Positive trend with neutrality
SLIGHTLY_NEGATIVE	Negative trend with neutrality
RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history

Historical Basic Data
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset compiles the historical changes to basic registration information associated with the consulted CNPJ (Brazilian taxpayer ID), as captured over time by BigDataCorp. It includes records of changes to data such as company name, tax regime, and CNAE (Brazilian National Classification of Economic Activities), as well as aggregated information that assists in analyzing the evolution of the company's registration data. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please consult the Basic Data documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: history_basic_data.

1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Activity Indicators
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers indicators related to a company's activity level, including revenue estimates, number of employees, activity level, and operational signals such as digital presence, recurrence of registration information, and attributes derived from CNPJ (Brazilian company tax ID) transactions, combining statistical inferences and objective indicators. For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, consult the Economic documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: activity_indicators.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per attribute returned
1 - 10.000	R$ 0.050*
10.001 - 50.000	R$ 0.048*
50.001 - 100.000	R$ 0.046*
100.001 - 500.000	R$ 0.044*
500.001 - 1.000.000	R$ 0.042*
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	R$ 34,000.00 (fixed price)*
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Billing pattern for this dataset

Each returned attribute is charged individually. Inferences are considered individually, so each inference acts as a multiplier on the query value. Indicators, regardless of the quantity returned, are collectively considered as a single billing unit.

If the desired attributes are not selected, the query will return all available attributes, and the charge will be multiplied by the total number of attributes returned (inferences + set of indicators).

Example calculation:

Total number of CNPJs consulted: 1,000
Attributes returned by CNPJ (without field selection):
5 inferences
1 set of indicators
Total: 6 attributes

Calculation of charges: 1,000 (CNPJs) x 6 (attributes) = 6,000 records charged.

The final value will be obtained by multiplying the 6,000 records charged by the unit value corresponding to the applicable price range.

To select only the desired attributes and optimize billing, use the field selection feature. To understand how to customize the data return, see the Customize Return section.

Available attributes
Attribute	Classification	Possible values
EmployeesRange	Inference	ATE 01, 002 TO 005, 006 TO 009, 010 TO 019, 020 TO 049, 050 TO 099, 100 TO 499, >= 500, NO INFORMATION, NO LINKS
IncomeRange	Inference	Up to 50K, Above 50K Up to 100K, Above 100K Up to 250K, Above 250K Up to 500K, Above 500K Up to 1MM, Above 1MM Up to 2.5MM, Above 2.5MM Up to 5MM, Above 5MM Up to 10MM, Above 10MM Up to 25MM, Above 25MM Up to 50MM, Above 50MM Up to 100MM, Above 100MM Up to 250MM, Above 250MM Up to 500MM, Above 500MM, No Information, Exempt Company, Inactive Company
ActivityLevel	Inference	0 to 1
HasActivity	Inference	true, false
ShellCompanyLikelyhood	Inference	0 to 1
HasRecentEmail	Indicator	true, false
HasRecentPassages	Indicator	true, false
HasActiveDomain	Indicator	true, false
HasActiveSSL	Indicator	true, false
HasCorporateEmail	Indicator	true, false
NumberOfBranches	Indicator	Numeric
RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history

Make a request to see history.

Influence of the Corporate Structure
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset infers the level of influence of the shareholder structure of the company being consulted, considering in an integrated way aspects such as the exposure and profile of the shareholders in the media, political involvement and history of lawsuits, allowing the evaluation of the potential impact of the company's shareholders in the social and institutional context.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Public Exposure documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: owners_influence.

Price list

1 - 10.000	BRL 0.100
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.096
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.092
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.088
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.084
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	R$68,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Marketplaces
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers information about a company's presence in online marketplaces selling products, considering both aggregate indicators and details of its performance in each individual marketplace where the company was identified. The data reflects the existence of active profiles, product categories sold, and metrics associated with the company's performance in these digital environments.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Digital Presence documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: marketplace_data.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
marketplace name	Marketplace name identified	Equal	Americanas, Submarino, MagazineLuiza, etc.
product category	Category of products sold	Contains	Electronics, toys, etc.
sellertotalproducts	Total number of products sold on the marketplace	Bigger or equal	Any numeric value
seller rating	Seller rating level on the marketplace	Bigger or equal	Any numeric value between 0 and 5
Pagination

When more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x) in the field Datasets.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result
array of objects
required

Result lists

object
MarketplaceData
object
required

The main object returned by the dataset, containing consolidated information related to the queried entity.

MARKETPLACEDATA OBJECT
QueryId
string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string
required

The date when the request was received and processed.

Status
object
required

Status list for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES

object
required

List of evidence used for each dataset.

Financial Market
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers financial and corporate information on publicly traded companies, based on public data provided by regulatory bodies and capital market entities. The results include information such as balance sheet, financial performance, main shareholders, and shareholding structure. The absence of results indicates that the company consulted does not have shares traded on the stock exchange.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Sectoral documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: financial_market.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Awards and Certifications
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers aggregated and detailed information about awards and certifications obtained by the consulted entity, encompassing recognition from different spheres of activity, such as governmental, academic, private, national or international awards, as well as professional, technical, security or compliance certifications. The data allows for the evaluation of institutional recognition, reputational positioning, and formal attributes associated with the entity's performance.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Reputation documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: awards_and_certifications.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.090
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.085
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.081
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.077
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.073
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 61,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
award name	prize name	Contains	Any name or part of the name of the award.
awardingorganizationname	Name of the organization that awarded the prize.	Equal	Name of the granting entity
certification name	certification name	Contains	Any name or part of the name of the certification
certifying entity	Name of the certifying entity	Equal	Name of the certifying entity
certification status	Certification status	Equal	Any possible status
Limit

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field DatasetsThis limit is applied independently to lists Awards and Certificates.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

Companies
POST
Presence in Collection
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset indicates whether the company being consulted has been involved in or has been involved in debt collection processes, based on the identification of instances of contact, attempted collection, or exposure to credit recovery mechanisms. The return does not provide information on the debt amount, the creditor, or the nature of the obligation, only the existence of the collection process within a specific period.

In addition to the total number of occurrences, the dataset provides consolidated temporal indicators, such as the number of consecutive months in collection and the volume of occurrences in the last 3, 6, and 12 months. All temporal indicators are calculated dynamically based on the query's reference date, when provided.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: collections.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.070
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.066
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.063
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.060
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.057
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 46,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Election Service Providers

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

Dataset que reúne informações sobre contratos e licitações firmados por políticos e partidos com prestadores de serviços eleitorais, incluindo registros de fornecimento, valores contratados e vínculos associados às campanhas, permitindo análises de relacionamento e envolvimento político entre entidades e agentes políticos. Os dados retornados contemplam tanto prestações de serviço realizadas quanto recebidas pela entidade consultada, cuja interpretação depende da comparação entre o nome da entidade consultada e o valor informado no campo PoliticianFullName.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Political Engagement documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: electoral_providers.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Log in to see full request history

q
string
required

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

Owners Lawsuits
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns information about legal and administrative proceedings involving the partners of the consulted company, following the same data structure, filters, parameters, and interpretation rules applied to the standard Legal and Administrative Proceedings dataset of the Companies API. The difference lies exclusively in the scope of the query, which considers corporate relationships instead of the directly consulted entity.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Legal Proceedings documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: owners_lawsuits.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.130
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.124
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.118
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.112
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.106
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 86,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing control over return volume, query performance, and the inclusion of administrative processes.

Key	Description	Possible Values
returnupdates	It determines whether process movements should be returned, directly impacting the response volume.	true, false (Default: true)
applyFiltersToStats	Indicates whether aggregated statistics should take into account the filters applied in the query.	true, false (Default: false)
returncvmprocesses	This determines whether CVM administrative proceedings should be included in the return, when they exist. CVM proceedings have specific numbering and some fields, such as CourtLevel and CourtType, are not returned.	true, false (Default: false)
updateslimit	Limits the number of returned transactions per process, prioritized by recency.	Number

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
capturedate	Process capture date	Between	[yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-dd]
closedate	Date of completion, closing, or archiving of the process.	Between	[yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-dd]
cnjsubject	Case number or subject name at the CNJ (National Council of Justice), according to the official table available on the CNJ website.	Equal	Number or text
cnjproceduretype	Case number or type name in the CNJ (National Council of Justice).	Equal	Number or text
courtlevel	Instance of the process	Equal	1, 2, 3
courtname	Court name	Equal	Supreme Federal Court (STF), Superior Court of Justice (STJ), Regional Federal Court of the 1st Region (TRF1), among others.
courttype	Type of court or jurisdiction of the case	Equal	CIVIL, CRIMINAL, TAX, SOCIAL SECURITY, LABOR, SPECIAL CIVIL, SPECIAL CRIMINAL, ADMINISTRATIVE, ELECTORAL, FINANCE, SPECIAL FINANCE
partypolarity	Polarity of the party in the process	Equal	ACTIVE, PASSIVE, NEUTRAL
partytype	Type of party in the process	Equal	AUTHOR, DEFENDANT, CLAIMANT, CLAIMED, LAWYER, REPORTER, ATTORNEY, WITNESS, VICTIM, JUDGE, INMATE, OTHER
noticed	Date the process was initiated or distributed.	Between	[yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-dd]
state	Process status (UF)	Equal	Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo, Minas Gerais, among others.
status	Process status	Contains	ACTIVE, DISTRIBUTED, DOWNLOADED, ATTACHED, DECIDED, FILED, EXECUTION, FINALIZED, CLOSED, ON APPEAL, REDISTRIBUTED, FINAL JUDGMENT, ARCHIVED, JUDGED, UNDEFINED, SUSPENDED
resjudicatadate	Date of final judgment	Between	[yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-dd]
value	Amount disputed in the process	Between	[Minimum maximum]

For performance reasons, in queries with more than 10,000 legal cases, filters are applied to the paginated results of the query . To ensure the complete application of the filters, it is necessary to paginate the available results.

Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x).

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

Order

This dataset allows sort the records in the main list using the modifier .order(campo=ascending/descending) in the field DatasetsAccepted fields:

LastMovementDate
NoticeDate
CloseDate
ResJudicataDate
CaptureDate
Value
Interpreting the field Parties.Polarity

Polarity indicates the nature of the entity's participation in the judicial process:

ACTIVE: the active party in the process, generally the party that initiates the action or submits the request to the Judiciary (e.g., Plaintiff, Applicant, Claimant, Executor).
PASSIVE: passive party in the process, usually the party against whom the action is brought (e.g., Defendant, Respondent, Defendant, Debtor).
NEUTRAL: parties that do not fall under the active or passive roles, such as Rapporteur, Lawyer, Attorney, or Interested Third Party.

Employees Industrial Properties
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with employees linked to the company being consulted, returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial property per employee, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: employees_industrial_property.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.730
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.694
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.659
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.626
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.595
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 496,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Limit

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier. .limit(x) in the field DatasetsThe default value is 1000 recordsTo understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the section. Customize Return.

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with partners linked to the company being consulted, returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial properties per partner, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: owners_industrial_property.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.162
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.154
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.146
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.139
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.132
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 109,400.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Limit

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier. .limit(x) in the field DatasetsThe default value is 1000 recordsTo understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the section. Customize Return.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

required

required

Limit

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset gathers information about trademarks and patents associated with the consulted CNPJ (Brazilian taxpayer ID), returning consolidated and detailed data on industrial properties, including indicators of quantity, geographic scope, and registration history.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Assets documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: industrial_property.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.090
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.085
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.081
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.077
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.073
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 61,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Log in to see full request history

Make a request to see history.

string
required

string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

200

Configurable Recency QSA
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns basic registration information of the consulted company and the composition of its shareholder structure (QSA), combining internal data from BigDataCorp with official information from the Federal Revenue Service. The dataset allows defining a minimum recency criterion for the shareholder data, performing dynamic re-evaluation of official sources when the available information does not meet the specified update level.

When the identification documents of the partners are not explicitly available in official sources, the dataset can apply inferences based on the name of the related entity, returning the document only when the association is considered sufficiently accurate.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: dynamic_qsa_data.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.090
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.085
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.081
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.077
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.073
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 0.069
5.000.001 - 10.000.000	BRL 0.066
10.000.001 - 50.000.000	BRL 0.063
50,000,001 and above	BRL 0.060
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
recency	Defines the maximum number of days since the last update of the QSA data. If the available data is older than the specified value, official sources are re-evaluated in real time to obtain the most recent information possible.	Number of days
Pagination

When more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x) in the field Datasets.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

Economic Group Relationships
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns information about entities—individuals and companies—that are part of the same economic group as the consulted entity, considering exclusively corporate ties. The return includes direct and indirect relationships that make up the structure of the economic group, and may result in large volumes of data due to the corporate complexity involved.

When the Federal Revenue Service does not have information about the shareholding structure of the subsidiary being consulted, the relationships are built from the shareholding structure of the parent company .

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: economic_group_relationships

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine your query or change the scope and depth of the relationships returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
group_level	It defines the level of the economic group up to which relationships should be considered. Level 1 corresponds to direct relationships.	Integer greater than zero
extended	Indicates whether the extended economic group should be returned, including relatives and companies associated with the people in the group.	true, false
group_search_limit	It limits the maximum number of relationships returned, directly impacting query performance.	Integer greater than zero
useHeadQuartersData	Indicates whether relationships should be built from the matrix document.	true, false

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
RelatedEntityTaxIdType	Type of document from the related entity	Equal	CPF, CNPJ
RelationshipLevel	Level of relationship within the economic group	Equal	1st-LEVEL, 2nd-LEVEL, 3rd-LEVEL, etc.
RelationshipType	Type of corporate relationship	Equal	QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative
Limit

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field DatasetsThe default value is 10,000 records.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

Fields with predefined values

The fields with predefined values ​​in this dataset follow the same pattern as the Relationships dataset. For a complete list of possible values ​​and their meanings, please refer to the Relationships reference documentation.

Relationships

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns information about entities related to the queried company, including individuals and legal entities associated through corporate ties, control, legal representation, or functional relationships. The return consolidates aggregated data and detailed lists of relationships, allowing for structured analysis of the company's network of connections.

When information about a subsidiary's shareholding structure is not available from the Federal Revenue Service, relationships can be built based on data from the parent company, ensuring the continuity and consistency of the returned relational structure.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, see the Relationships documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: relationships.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.030
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.028
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.027
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.026
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.025
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 21,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
useHeadQuartersData	Defines whether relationships should be built from data in the matrix of the consulted company.	true, false (Default: false)

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
relatedentitytaxidtype	Type of document from the related entity	Equal	CPF, CNPJ
relationshiplevel	relationship level	Contains	Direct, Indirect
relationshiptype	relationship type	Equal	QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x)To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the section. Customize Return.

Fields with predefined values

Some fields in this dataset have standardized values, which help in the correct interpretation of the returned relationships.

RelatedEntityTaxIdType	CPF, CNPJ
RelationshipType	QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative
RelationshipDataOrigin	FEDERAL REVENUE, MTE, INFERENCE

BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

object

array of objects
required

object

object
required

Phone numbers of related people.
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

A dataset that gathers phone numbers associated with individuals related to the consulted entity, regardless of any direct link to the entity itself, allowing for broader contact analysis based on corporate, functional, or administrative relationships.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: related_people_phones.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
relationshiptype	Type of relationship between the person and the entity.	Equal	QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative
type	phone type	Contains	mobile, work, home
isactive	Indicates whether the phone is active.	Equal	true, false
isrecent	Indicates whether the phone is recent.	Equal	true, false
ismain	Indicates whether the phone is the primary phone.	Equal	true, false
isindonotcalllist	Indicates whether the phone number is listed by PROCON.	Equal	true, false
areacode	Telephone area code	Equal	11, 21, 61, ...
Limit

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result
array of objects
required

Result lists

object
RelatedPeoplePhones
array of objects
required
object
RelationshipType
string
required

Indicates the type of relationship associated with this record. (QSA, Ownership, Employee, Legal Representative)

Number
string
required

Phone number associated with the entity.

AreaCode
string
required

Phone number area code.

CountryCode
string
required

Phone number country code.

Complement
string
required

Complement (extension, etc...).

Type
string
required

Composite field that describes the related entity and the phone context. (RELATED - {DOCUMENT-NUMBER} - {RELATIONSHIP-TYPE} - {PHONE-TYPE (WORK, MOBILE or HOME)})

PhoneTotalPassages
integer
required

Number of times this phone number was seen for this entity.

PhoneBadPassages
integer
required

Number of times this phone number was seen for this entity in a suspicious situation.

PhoneCrawlingPassages
integer
required

Number of phone passes with the entity originating a capture.

PhoneValidationPassages
integer
required

Number of phone passes with the entity originating from a validation.

PhoneQueryPassages
integer
required

Number of telephone passes with the entity that originates a query.

PhoneMonthAveragePassages
integer
required

Average number of times the phone was seen with the entity per month.

PhoneNumberOfEntities
integer
required

Number of distinct entities related to the telephone.

Last3MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages for this phone in the last 3 months.

Last6MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages for this phone in the last 6 months.

Last12MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages for this phone in the last 12 months.

Last18MonthsPassages
integer
required

Total number of passages for this phone in the last 18 months.

Priority
integer
required

Priority level of this phone number for this entity.

IsMain
boolean
required

Flag indicating whether this is the entity's primary telephone number.

IsRecent
boolean
required

Flag indicating whether this phone number has been recently seen for this entity.

IsActive
boolean
required

Flag that indicates whether this phone number is active for this entity.

IsInDoNotCallList
boolean
required

Flag indicating whether this phone number is registered in a PROCON 'Do Not Call List'.

CurrentCarrier
string
required

Current carrier name of the phone number.

PlanType
string
required

Plan type (PREPAID, CONTROL, REGULAR, OTHER, UNKNOWN).

LastValidationDate
string
required

Date this phone number was last validated.

FirstPassageDate
string
required

Date this phone number was first seen for this entity.

LastPassageDate
string
required

Date this phone number was last seen for this entity.

CreationDate
string
required

Date the record was created.

LastUpdateDate
string
required

Date the record was last updated.

PortabilityHistory
array of objects
required

List of objects with information about the phone number portability history.

object
OriginalCarrier
string
required

Phone number original carrier name.

NewCarrier
string
required

Name of the new operator of the phone number.

PortabilityDate
string
required

Date the phone number was ported.

HasOptIn
boolean
required

Flag that indicates whether this phone number has been explicitly accepted in our database.

QueryId
string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string
required

The date when the request was received and processed.

Status
object
required

Status list for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES
Evidences
object
required

List of evidence used for each dataset.

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/empresas
Description

This dataset returns addresses associated with the queried company, including aggregated information and indicators that aid in contact analysis, recency, and relevance. Addresses can be unified using the building code (BuildCode), allowing for the consolidation of similar records and improving the analytical quality of the results.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Contacts documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: phones_extended.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
zipcode	Used in conjunction with the address number to assist in building the BuildCode and improve the quality of the result.	Valid postal code
addressnumber	Used in conjunction with CEP to assist in building the BuildCode and improve the quality of the result.	Address number
useRawRFData	It instructs the system to return the address exactly as captured from the Federal Revenue Service, without corrections or standardizations.	true, false

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
Type	Type of address	Equal	work, home
isratified	Indicates whether the address is verified.	Equal	true, false
isactive	Indicates whether the address is active.	Equal	true, false
isrecent	Indicates whether the address is recent.	Equal	true, false
ismain	Indicates whether the address is a primary address.	Equal	true, false
state	State acronym	Equal	RJ, SP, MG, ES...
zipcode	Address zip code	Starts with	Any complete postal code or the first x digits.
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field Datasets And, when more records are available, it is possible to paginate the results using the modifier. .next(x).

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result
array of objects
required

Result lists

object
ExtendedPhones
object
required

The main object returned by the dataset, containing consolidated information related to the queried entity.

EXTENDEDPHONES OBJECT
QueryId
string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string
required

The date when the request was received and processed.

Status
object
required

Status list for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES

object
required

List of evidence used for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES

Legal Amazon
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset identifies whether a given address or geographic area is located within, crosses, or is near the Legal Amazon region, according to the current geopolitical delimitation. The data provided supports risk analysis, environmental compliance, and validation of economic or contractual activities subject to territorial and environmental restrictions.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: legal_amazon.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing for the definition of different ways to georeference the analyzed area.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates
householdcode	Geographic residence identifier	Code
building code	Geographic identifier for a building.	Code
latitude + longitude	Coordinates of the lookout point (must be provided together)	latitude{NUMBER}, longitude{NUMBER}

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

object

Environmental Preservation Areas
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns information about environmental protection areas located within, overlapping, or near the consulted geographic area, indicating the existence and spatial relationship between the reported location and officially protected areas.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the documentation. Environmental and Cultural Protection.
Technical name of the dataset: environmental_preservation_areas.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing for the definition of different ways to georeference the analyzed area.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates
householdcode	Geographic residence identifier	Code
building code	Geographic identifier for a building.	Code
latitude + longitude	Coordinates of the lookout point (must be provided together)	latitude{NUMBER}, longitude{NUMBER}

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS

Make a request to see history.

Biomes
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

Dataset que identifica o bioma ao qual um endereço, ponto geográfico ou área consultada pertence, bem como indicadores de presença ou proximidade de biomas relevantes em relação à localização informada.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: biomes_data.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

As chaves abaixo representam algumas das chaves complementares aceitas neste dataset, permitindo definir diferentes formas de georreferenciamento ou agrupamento territorial para a análise de biomas.

Key	Description	Possible Values
householdcode	Geographic residence identifier	Code
building code	Geographic identifier for a building.	Code
state	Unidade federativa utilizada para delimitação territorial	State acronym
city	Nome da cidade utilizada na consulta	Text
cities	Lista de cidades para análise conjunta	List of city names
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates
geocode	Identificador geográfico oficial	Código IBGE

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month
BODY PARAMS
q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result
array of objects
required

Result lists

object
BiomesData
object
required

The main object returned by the dataset, containing consolidated information related to the queried entity.

BIOMESDATA OBJECT
QueryId
string
required

Unique caller ID.

ElapsedMilliseconds
number
required

The number of milliseconds elapsed during the call.

QueryDate
string
required

The date when the request was received and processed.

Status
object
required

Status list for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES
Evidences
object
required

List of evidence used for each dataset.

VIEW ADDITIONAL PROPERTIES

Embargoed Areas ICMBio Query
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

Dataset que identifica se uma área geográfica informada encontra-se dentro, cruza ou está próxima de áreas embargadas por órgãos ambientais, indicando a existência de sanções administrativas aplicadas para proteção e recuperação ambiental. O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance ambiental e validação de atividades econômicas ou contratuais sujeitas a restrições ambientais.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the documentation. Environmental and Cultural Protection.
Technical name of the dataset: embargoed_areas.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing for the definition of different ways to georeference the analyzed area.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates
householdcode	Geographic residence identifier	Code
building code	Geographic identifier for a building.	Code
latitude + longitude	Coordinates of the lookout point (must be provided together)	latitude{NUMBER}, longitude{NUMBER}

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

SICAR Legal Reserves Query
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

Dataset que identifica se uma área geográfica informada encontra-se dentro, cruza ou está próxima de áreas classificadas como Reserva Legal, conforme registros do Cadastro Ambiental Rural (CAR). O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance ambiental e validação de atividades econômicas ou contratuais sujeitas a restrições de uso sustentável do território.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: legal_reserve.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

As chaves abaixo representam algumas das chaves complementares aceitas neste dataset, permitindo definir a delimitação geográfica da área analisada.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history

Make a request to see history.

Companies
POST
Nearby Companies Data
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns a list of companies located near a specified geographic region, considering latitude and longitude coordinates, search radius, and additional filtering criteria. The return includes basic information about the companies found and aggregated indicators for the region consulted, allowing for territorial, sectoral, and economic density analyses.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic Activity documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: companies_data.

Price list
Data Delivered in the Month	Value per data in returned list
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.020
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.019
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.018
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.017
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.016
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 14,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Notice: The charge for this dataset is carried out returned by company in the results listing. The use of the parameter is recommended. Limit, as the number of companies nearby may be high. The maximum return per query is 100 companies (default value when not specified). Monthly billing takes into account the cumulative total of companies returned in all consultations during the period.

Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to refine the query or change how the data is analyzed and returned.

Key	Description	Possible Values
distance	Search radius from the given coordinates	Numerical value with unit (m or km)* (Default: 5km)

*In the absence of a unit, the value is interpreted as kilometers. The maximum permitted radius is 5km (5,000m), with values ​​exceeding this limit automatically adjusted.

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Filters
Field	Filter description	Filter type	Possible Filter Values
economicactivitycodes	Economic activity code	Equal	CNAE Code
legalnaturecodes	Code of legal nature	Equal	Code of legal nature
namefilter	Filter by company name	Contains	Text
employees range	range of number of employees	Equal	ATE 01, 002 TO 005, 006 TO 009, 010 TO 019, 020 TO 049, 050 TO 099, 100 TO 499, >= 500
taxidstatus	Company registration status	Equal	ACTIVE, CANCELLED, INACTIVE, NULL, SUSPENDED and variations
Limits and Pagination

This dataset allows you to limit the number of records returned using the modifier .limit(x) in the field DatasetsThe default and maximum value is 100 recordsWhen more records are available, use the modifier. .next(x) to paginate the results.

To understand how to apply filters, limit the number of results, paginate, and customize the data returned, see the Customize Returns section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

Limit

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

SICAR Rural Property Data
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns data on rural properties registered in the Rural Environmental Registry System (SICAR), based on the CAR (Rural Environmental Registry) number provided. The CAR is a national, mandatory, electronic public registry for rural properties that compiles declared environmental information about the property or possession, including permanent preservation areas (APP), restricted use areas, legal reserves, remnants of native vegetation, and consolidated areas.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Rural Properties documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: sicar_property_data.

Price list

10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.095

100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.085
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.081
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 0.077
5.000.001 - 10.000.000	BRL 0.073
10.000.001 - 50.000.000	BRL 0.069
50,000,001 and above	BRL 0.066

Addresses in Risk Areas
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset identifies whether a given geographic point is located within or near defined areas that may present a public safety risk, according to official IBGE (Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics) data. The results support risk analysis, credit assessment, onboarding, logistics, and other location-sensitive decisions.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk and Public Safety documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: address_risk.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.070
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.066
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.063
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.060
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.057
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 46,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing for the definition of different ways to identify and qualify the analyzed geographic point.

Key	Description	Possible Values
zipcode	Postal code used as a geographic reference for the location consulted.	CEP
addressnumber	Address number used to refine the location of the queried point.	Number

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Interpreting the return values ​​from the fields Point, Radius10m, Radius25m, Radius50m and Radius100m

The returned fields indicate the risk classification associated with the geographic point specified in the query and its surroundings, considering progressive radii of distance from that point. The field Point represents exclusively the classification of the exact point consulted, while the fields Radius10m, Radius25m, Radius50m and Radius100m They indicate the classification of the area located up to the respective distance, measured from the given point.

Each field returns a numeric value according to the classification below:

Classification	Meaning
1	This indicates that the point or area analyzed is located within a sectorized community, generally associated with areas of greater territorial complexity.
2	This indicates that the point or area analyzed is located within a non-sectorized community, generally associated with smaller areas.
3	This indicates that the point or area analyzed is not located within any defined community.

Crime Statistics
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns aggregated statistics on criminal occurrences recorded in a given city, including indicators related to crimes such as theft, robbery, homicide, kidnapping, and drug trafficking. The data allows for macro-level analyses of public safety and assessment of territorial risk associated with the consulted location.

The query always considers the municipality as the unit of analysis, regardless of the geographic key provided. When a polygon encompasses more than one municipality, the returned data corresponds to the city closest to the centroid of the specified area. This dataset is only available for the states of São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, and Minas Gerais .

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Risk and Public Safety documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: criminal_statistics_data.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the complementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing for the definition of different ways to geographically identify the city being analyzed.

Key	Description	Possible Values
state + city	Explicit identification of the municipality to be analyzed.	state{SP or RJ or MG}, city{CITY_NAME}
polygon	Geographic area used to identify the reference municipality for the query.	List of coordinates
latitude + longitude	Coordinates used to identify the reference municipality.	latitude{NUMBER}, longitude{NUMBER}

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

Company Statistics

https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns aggregated statistics on companies associated with a specific geographic region, based on a given address or postal code. The return consolidates indicators such as the number of active and inactive companies, total number of employees, aggregate revenue, declared share capital, and analytical distributions across different economic and registration dimensions.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Economic Activity documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: companies_statistics.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact

Limit

Municipalities
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

This dataset returns basic information about Brazilian municipalities within a defined geographic area, based on the identification of overlap between the consulted region and the territorial boundaries of the municipalities. The return includes official identifiers, such as IBGE and SICOR codes, as well as the percentage of overlap of the consulted area in each identified municipality.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Basic Data documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: counties_map.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

The keys below represent some of the supplementary keys accepted in this dataset, allowing you to change how the geographic area is defined for the query.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Allows you to manually define the geographic search area using a longitude/latitude coordinate polygon, used to identify municipalities with overlapping areas.	List of coordinates

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

string
required

string
required

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

200

Archaeological Sites
POST
https://plataforma.bigdatacorp.com.br/addresses
Description

Dataset que identifica a existência de sítios arqueológicos associados a uma área geográfica informada, indicando a presença, cruzamento ou proximidade desses sítios em relação à área analisada. O retorno apoia análises de risco, compliance regulatório e validação de atividades sujeitas a restrições de preservação do patrimônio histórico e cultural.

For more information on business context, applications, and use cases, please refer to the Environmental and Cultural Protection documentation.

Technical name of the dataset: archaeological_sites.

Price list
Queries Held in the Month	Value per query
1 - 10.000	BRL 0.050
10.001 - 50.000	BRL 0.048
50.001 - 100.000	BRL 0.046
100.001 - 500.000	BRL 0.044
500.001 - 1.000.000	BRL 0.042
1.000.001 - 5.000.000	BRL 34,000.00 (fixed price)
5,000,001 and above	Contact
Relevant supplementary keys

As chaves abaixo representam algumas das chaves complementares aceitas neste dataset, permitindo definir a forma de georreferenciamento da área analisada.

Key	Description	Possible Values
polygon	Geographic polygon used to delimit the area of ​​analysis.	List of longitude/latitude coordinates
householdcode	Geographic residence identifier	Code
building code	Geographic identifier for a building.	Code
latitude + longitude	Coordinates of the lookout point (must be provided together)	latitude{NUMBER}, longitude{NUMBER}

To see all available keys and understand how to combine them, see the Query Parameters section.

RECENT REQUESTS
Log in to see full request history
TIME	STATUS	USER AGENT	

Make a request to see history.
0 Requests This Month

q
string
required

A string that defines the query's input parameters, used to specify the identifiers and filters applicable to the dataset.

Datasets
string
required

String containing the technical names of the datasets to be queried.

Limit
number

Maximum number of entities returned in the response, used in queries performed without a primary key. Maximum allowed value: 80

RESPONSE
200

Dataset return parameters.

RESPONSE BODY
object
Result

required
